goal: KongCode — substrate-does-the-work. Every write auto-seals. Every hook fires end-to-end. Every signal lands.

ships: Version + test-count badges aligned to current state
progress.json rewritten to reflect post-0.4.2 substrate-alive milestones

0.4.2.theme: Substrate connectivity hardening — UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, Stop
ships: UserPromptSubmit now reads payload.prompt (canonical Claude Code field) with payload.user_prompt fallback
PostToolUse now reads payload.tool_response (canonical) with payload.tool_result fallback; handles object + string shapes
PostToolUse now wires recordToolOutcome(!isError) — failure detected from payload.error or tool_response.is_error
Stop hook now reads transcript_path → readLatestAssistantText → ingestTurn (awaited) → evaluateRetrieval, closing the retrieval-quality loop
New tail-read transcript reader (256 KB window) for long-running session efficiency
16 new regression tests pinning the canonical Claude Code payload-field contract for the highest-fired hook handlers
Auto-seal contract: every commitKnowledge() write fires concept/memory/artifact/turn edges
6 new MCP tools: memory_health, link_hierarchy, supersede, record_finding, cluster_scan, what_is_missing
postflight() wired into Stop hook (orchestrator_metrics now populates)

verified_live: Assistant turns ingesting on Stop via transcript_path
+0.2 toolBoost in computeSignals lifting utilization on tool-completing turns
Auto-seal still firing across concept/memory/artifact writes

deferred_to_0_5_0.H_write_time_dedup: Observe Stage B effects in production first
deferred_to_0_5_0.subagent_v2_artifact_attribution: Thread active subagent_id through after-tool-call + post-tool-use
deferred_to_0_5_0.stale_mcp_reaper: Auto-kill MCPs whose socket isn't newest — zombies linger after Claude Code restarts and consume memory until manually killed
deferred_to_0_5_0.windowed_quality_metric: getQualitySignals uses GROUP ALL — windowing to recent N would speed gate recovery without forcing graduation
deferred_to_0_5_0.issue_2_shared_daemon: Multi-MCP Option B — shared daemon pattern for >1 Claude Code window

operational_notes: IDENTITY_VERSION (0.4.1) is decoupled from package.json — bump only when IDENTITY_CHUNKS content changes; substrate-only releases (0.4.2/0.4.3) leave it untouched to avoid needless re-seeds.
BOOTSTRAP_VERSION (0.4.0) is similarly content-tied, not release-tied.
Hook proxy picks newest-PID-alive socket; on multi-MCP installs the older MCPs become unreachable until killed (see stale_mcp_reaper above).
After dist updates, a new MCP must be spawned (close+reopen Claude Code) — Node doesn't hot-reload.
